overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character navigating a suburban Los Santos neighborhood at night. The character moves along sidewalks, through residential driveways, crosses streets, and enters a park area while streetlights cast an orange glow across the environment.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past suburban homes and landscaped bushes

entered.detail: single-story suburban home with illuminated windows and front lawn
tall palm tree lining the residential street
tall street lamp casting orange sodium light
blue residential trash bin on sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a suburban sidewalk at night, passing single-family homes with illuminated windows. Streetlights cast long shadows while palm trees line the street, and occasional cars pass by on the adjacent road.

events.description: character turns right off the main sidewalk into a residential driveway

agents.ego_description: turning right into a driveway and walking between houses toward the back alley

entered.detail: white garage door at the end of the driveway
illuminated high-rise buildings visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Turning right into a residential driveway, the character walks between houses with the downtown skyline visible in the distance. Trash bins and garage doors line the narrow passage between properties.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection transitioning to park entrance

events.description: exits residential alley and crosses the street toward a park area
enters park area with pathway and bollards

agents.ego_description: crossing the illuminated street and entering a park area with bollards and pathways

entered.detail: single-story commercial structure with lit windows
concrete pathway leading into park area
short black bollard marking park entrance

segments.scene_description: Crossing the illuminated street, a large billboard becomes visible alongside a commercial building. The character enters a park area with bollards lining the pathway, transitioning from urban residential to open park space.

agents.ego_description: walking along the park pathway between bollards heading toward the open area

entered.detail: concrete bridge structure spanning across the park

segments.scene_description: Walking through the park pathway lined with bollards, surrounded by open grass areas. A concrete bridge overpass is visible in the distance as the character moves deeper into the park environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet suburban neighborhood at night that gradually opens into a spacious public park. It begins by gliding along a sidewalk past illuminated single-family homes and palm trees, where streetlights cast long shadows across the road. As the camera turns right into a narrow residential driveway, the view shifts to pass between garage doors and trash bins with the distant downtown skyline framing the horizon. The scene then expands as the camera crosses an illuminated street past a large commercial billboard, transitioning from the dense residential layout into an open park area. Finally, the movement continues along a bollard-lined pathway through wide grassy fields, heading toward a concrete bridge overpass in the distance.
